title: senecio viridis
intro: Senecio viridis, also known as Irish moss or Irish tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Senecio viridis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Senecio viridis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal supplements and remedies to promote overall well-being.
